title: Segfault on automatic index using unknown collating function
key_bug_features: automatic index using unknown collating function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT COLLATE NOCASE, value REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Alice' OR name IS NULL;
CREATE INDEX idx_value ON test_table(value COLLATE UNKNOWN);
